textDisplay: It Was Created For Special Visual Effects & Animation By Industrial Light & Magic.

The digital effects in physical environment make no sense for me. The previous 2 movies had (in their own sense) a strong logic. This one is just made for the show.. My biggest fear is that they just want to integrate them into the Marvel universe later on.... That would be the ultimate end to a bit of an intellectual exercise this subject used to provide...
First! And hopefully it shall be good 🤞
